reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: All gates passed. Gate 3 (Code Verification): BlobRPCMinValidSlot at beacon-chain/sync/rpc_blob_sidecars_by_range.go:136-148 calculates minStart = max(currEpoch - minReqEpochs, DenebForkEpoch) without checking for Fulu deprecation deadline. Gate 4 (Exploitability): An attacker can trigger this via P2P by sending BlobSidecarsByRangeRequest after current_epoch >= FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_BLOB_SIDECARS_REQUESTS, causing the handler to serve blobs instead of responding empty/rejecting. This violates the protocol's deprecation requirement and prevents clean migration to data columns. Gate 5 (Spec Reference): Property from outputs/01e_PARTIAL_W2B3_1771748669.json correctly states 'blob_sidecars_by_range must be fully deprecated after FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS' with assertion 'current_epoch >= FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_BLOB_SIDECARS_REQUESTS => respond_empty_or_reject'. Severity: Affects Prysm only (31% CL network share), protocol violation preventing proper Fusaka migration. Medium severity appropriate for protocol compliance issue.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: blob_sidecars_by_range must be fully deprecated after FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS. Assertion: current_epoch >= FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_BLOB_SIDECARS_REQUESTS => respond_empty_or_reject (from outputs/01e_PARTIAL_W2B3_1771748669.json, SG-011)
